description: Choose one of the following writing tasks and write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.title: A healthy lifestyle
tasks.prompt: You see this announcement on an English-language website.||Articles wanted!||A healthy lifestyle||What do you do to stay healthy?||What advice would you give to other teenagers?||Write your article.
tasks.modelAnswer: How to stay healthy||I think it is important for teenagers to have a healthy lifestyle. I try to stay healthy by walking to school, playing basketball twice a week and eating fruit every day. I also try not to go to bed too late during the week.||My advice to other teenagers is simple. First, find a sport or activity you enjoy, because exercise is easier when it is fun. Second, do not eat too many sweets or snacks. Finally, remember to rest.||You do not need to be perfect, but small changes can make you feel much better.

tasks.title: Story
tasks.prompt: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.||Your story must begin with this sentence:||The lights went out just as we were finishing our dinner.||Write your story.
tasks.startingSentence: The lights went out just as we were finishing our dinner.
tasks.modelAnswer: The lights went out just as we were finishing our dinner. Everyone stopped talking, and the room became completely dark. My little brother screamed, but Dad quickly found a torch in the kitchen.||We looked outside and saw that all the houses in the street were dark too. Mum suggested playing cards until the electricity came back. At first, I was annoyed because I wanted to watch TV, but soon we were all laughing.||After an hour, the lights came on again. Surprisingly, nobody wanted to watch TV anymore because the game was more fun.
